name: Partnerize Partner Management API
what_it_does: Partnerize REST API for partner program management, affiliate marketing, and performance-based partnership automation. Enables AI agents to manage partner recruitment and relationship management for partnership program operations, handle commission tracking and automated payment processing for performance partner compensation, access granular attribution and conversion tracking for partner performance analytics, retrieve partner segmentation and tier management for program optimization, manage automated commissioning rules and custom rate management for flexible partner incentives, handle publisher communication and campaign management for partner engagement, access real-time reporting and partner performance dashboards for program analytics, retrieve fraud and invalid traffic detection for performance marketing quality, manage integration with major travel, retail, and financial services affiliate networks, and automate partner onboarding and compliance verification for program compliance.
use_cases: Managing partner programs from affiliate marketing agents
Tracking partner performance from marketing analytics agents
Automating commission payments from partner operations agents
Recruiting new partners from partner development agents
not_for: Small businesses without dedicated affiliate program management
Influencer-first programs without traditional affiliate focus
Organizations using Impact.com or Rakuten exclusively
best_when: An enterprise in travel, retail, financial services, or technology using Partnerize wants AI agents to automate partner recruitment, commission management, performance tracking, and affiliate network operations.
avoid_when: FTC DISCLOSURE RISK: Automated affiliate content or promotion must include required FTC material connection disclosure; automated partner content without disclosure creates brand liability. Travel sector affiliate rates — Partnerize is strong in travel affiliate (airlines, hotels, OTAs); automated commission rate changes in travel must account for GDS booking timing and cancellation rate differences that affect net commission profitability. Commission fraud in financial services — financial product affiliate marketing (insurance, credit cards, loans) requires careful fraud monitoring; lead fraud and application fraud are endemic in financial affiliate channels.

auth.notes: Partnerize uses API key and OAuth 2.0 authentication. REST API with JSON. Documentation at reporting.partnerize.com/apidoc. Newcastle upon Tyne, UK HQ. Founded 2010 as Performance Horizon. Rebranded to Partnerize 2019. Private (Accel Partners). 250+ enterprise brand clients. Strong in travel, retail, and financial services affiliate. Competes with Impact.com, Rakuten Advertising, and CJ Affiliate for partner program management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription; percentage of managed commission spend
pricing.notes: Newcastle, UK. Founded 2010. Accel Partners-backed. 250+ enterprise clients. Travel and retail affiliate focus. Competes with Impact.com and Rakuten Advertising.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented per integration

known_agent_gotchas: FTC DISCLOSURE: Automated partner content promotion must include required FTC material connection disclosure; UK equivalent is ASA CAP Code compliance for UK-based partner programs

Travel cancellation rate impact — travel sector affiliate commissions are net of cancellations; automated commission optimization based on gross bookings ignores cancellation rate differential that makes some partners unprofitable net

Financial services lead fraud — financial product affiliate programs (insurance, loans, credit cards) are high-fraud channels; automated lead approval without fraud scoring creates acquisition cost overruns and regulatory risk
GDPR tracking compliance — Partnerize tracking for EU partners requires cookie consent and GDPR-compliant tracking implementation; automated tracking without consent violates GDPR Article 6

Publisher compliance verification — automated partner onboarding must verify publisher content compliance; automated approval of partner sites with trademark bidding, coupon fraud, or policy violations creates brand damage

Multi-currency commission — Partnerize manages global programs with multi-currency commissions; automated reporting must specify currency basis; currency fluctuation affects partner profitability analysis
agent_readiness.security_notes: Partner marketing. SOC2, ISO27001. API key/OAuth2. US/EU/UK. Partner and commission data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Partner marketing. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2. US/EU/UK. Partner and conversion data.
